ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPProductStrategy = true, Name = "Design & Proposal", INCLUDES(PerformanceFeeMethod__c,'HighWaterMark'), ISBLANK(HighWaterMarkPeriod__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If the Perf Fee Method is 'HighWaterMark', please provide a High Water Mark Period.
